name: David Chiang
headline: CTO / AI 工具化 / 產品落地
subHeadline: 協助企業把 AI、資料流程與內部工具做成能上線、能維護、能帶來效率的產品。
subHeadlineEn: I help teams turn AI, data workflows, and internal tools into maintainable products that ship and improve real operations.
bio: 如果你有重複的人工作業、分散的資料、客服 / 內容 / 營運流程卡住，或想把 AI 放進既有產品，我可以從需求拆解、技術選型、原型開發到上線維運一起處理。
擅長電商、行銷科技、內容工具、聊天機器人、瀏覽器外掛、AI / ML 應用與內部系統。
[ 合作方式：可正職 / 可兼職 / 專案顧問 ｜不做博弈、加密幣與交易所 ]
曾創辦 4 家公司，帶過 300+ 人團隊；單一公司連續 3 年年營業額近 2 億。
→ github 大量個人開源專案 超過 111 組
bioEn: If your team is stuck with repetitive manual work, scattered data, slow content or operations workflows, or wants to add AI into an existing product, I can help from requirements, architecture, prototyping, launch, and maintenance.
Strong in e-commerce, marketing technology, content tools, chatbots, browser extensions, AI / ML applications, and internal systems.
[ Available for full-time, part-time, or project advisory work. No gambling, crypto, or crypto exchanges. ]
Founded 4 companies, led teams of 300+ people, and ran one company with nearly NT$200M annual revenue for 3 consecutive years.
